en.title: Essay writer
en.prompt: I want you to act as an essay writer. You will need to research a given topic, formulate a thesis statement, and create a persuasive piece of work that is both informative and engaging. My first suggestion request is [essay topic]
en.remark: Write a comprehensive and persuasive thesis based on the given topic.

related.title: Scademician
related.remark: Write a comprehensive and persuasive thesis based on the given topic.

related.title: Thesis reply
related.remark: Discussing questions in essay form allows for coherent, structured and higher quality responses.

related.title: Novelist
related.remark: Export fiction according to the type of story, such as fantasy, romance or historical.

metaDescription: Build a strong thesis and craft an engaging, informative essay on any topic. Master argumentation and persuasion.

faq.q: Compared with ID 20, which one should I use?
faq.a: ID 20 takes an academic researcher angle and is more rigorous and survey-style; ID 21 is essay-style or argumentative writing, with a clear thesis and persuasive aim. Choose 20 for literature reviews or book reports, choose 21 for argumentative essays, policy analysis, or opinion pieces.

faq.q: The thesis is not sharp and it just lists material, how do I fix that?
faq.a: Rewrite the topic as a declarative statement, for example change "remote work" into "remote work is not a good fit for startups." Without a clear position, the AI only lays out information evenly. Give it a slanted thesis and it will actually organize supporting evidence and rebut the other side.
